case_title: CHESLEY TOM VS. ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR COMPANY OF S.F.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2008 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO MAY-27-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. REQUEST FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE GIVEN TO DEFENDANT IN OPEN COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR COMPANY OF S.F.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOM, CHESLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR COMPANY OF S.F. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,085.00, THE LIABILITY OF DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR COMPANY IS LIMITED TO $5000.00 BY OPERATION STATUTE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-25-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR COMPANY OF S.F.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY TOM, CHESLEY AS TO DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR COMPANY OF S.F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOM, CHESLEY AS TO DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR COMPANY OF S.F.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2008 - JUDGMENT.
